justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to suggest another time, rather than proactively offering a range of alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made one slightly redundant API call by checking for a specific time on Wednesday when the user had already indicated flexibility for that day.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer expressed frustration multiple times due to the agent's inability to proactively offer available slots, making the experience feel somewhat tiring.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well and apologized for the difficulty, but could have been more proactive in offering solutions after repeated unavailability.
